title: After you apply: Application for a Trust Account Number  - Canada.ca
content:
Application for a Trust Account Number
The trust account number will be displayed on-screen at the end of the online Trust account registration.
Remember to submit a signed copy of the trust document or the last will and testament . Include the trust account number on all correspondence.
The trust account number will be mailed to you after we have processed the Form T3APP,Application for Trust Account Number .

## Access to the account
If you want online access to the trust account, please visit About My Trust Account – Canada.ca to learn more about our online services.
With offline access to the account you can request information in writing by sending a letter to the tax centre on page 3 of the Form T3APP. Otherwise, information can be requested by phone as indicated in Contact us .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
